steps.title: Spot the goal
steps.content: The student wants to “emphasize a similarity” in how Bangkok and Chiang Mai celebrate. This is the key measure.

steps.title: See why B succeeds
steps.content: B uses “In both Bangkok and Chiang Mai” to signal shared celebration between the cities, then identifies what they share: thousands gathering for water fights. A contrasts locations with “whereas,” C contradicts itself with “but,” and D ignores the comparison. That matches choice B — B is correct.
